ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the marker */,
  "intercept" REAL /* Intercept value for the marker */,
  "nigra" REAL /* Nigra value for the marker */,
  "nig_p_adj" REAL /* Adjusted p-value for the marker */,
  "chr" INTEGER /* Chromosome number */,
  "bp" INTEGER /* Base pair position */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of marker (e.g., SNP, Indel) */,
  "reference_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele for the marker */,
  "alternate_allele" TEXT /* Alternate allele for the marker */,
  "marker_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the marker */,
  "publication_id" TEXT /* ID of the publication where the marker was identified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markers_chr FOREIGN KEY ("chr") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chr_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_markers" (
  "project_marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-marker association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker */,
  "importance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the importance of the marker in the project */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the marker annotation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_markers_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES markers ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_markers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chr_number" INTEGER /* Chromosome number */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome in base pairs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chromosome */,
  "ncbi_accession" TEXT /* NCBI accession number for the chromosome */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marker_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene associated with the marker */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene associated with the marker */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Function of the gene associated with the marker */,
  "trait_association" TEXT /* Traits associated with the marker */,
  "disease_association" TEXT /* Diseases associated with the marker */,
  "annotation_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marker_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marker_annotations_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES markers ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marker_annotations_trait_association FOREIGN KEY ("trait_association") REFERENCES trait_associations ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marker_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marker_annotations_disease_association FOREIGN KEY ("disease_association") REFERENCES disease_associations ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_bp" INTEGER /* Start base pair position of the gene */,
  "end_bp" INTEGER /* End base pair position of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_function_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the gene's function */,
  "gene_expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "gene_pathway" TEXT /* Pathway in which the gene is involved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trait_associations" (
  "trait_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  "trait_source" TEXT /* Source of the trait data (e.g., study, database) */,
  "trait_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the trait association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_associations" (
  "disease_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "disease_source" TEXT /* Source of the disease data (e.g., study, database) */,
  "disease_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the disease association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has in the project (e.g., read, write) */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last access to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the marker or project */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker being accessed (nullable if accessing a project) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed (nullable if accessing a marker) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the marker or project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES markers ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., data, report, image) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version number of the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
